---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Gonzalo Salomoni"
date: "2026-06-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```

```{r}
# 1. Cargar DZ2021 y agregar a DEA2014
dz_mapa <- st_read(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/geography-dz2021-geojson/DZ2021.geojson",
  quiet = TRUE
) %>%
  st_set_crs(29902)

dea_mapa <- dz_mapa %>%
  group_by(DEA2014_cd, DEA2014_nm) %>%
  summarise(
    geometry = st_union(geometry),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
# 2. Cargar religión actual 2021
religion_actual <- read_excel(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/Census2021_religion.xlsx",
  sheet = "Table",
  skip = 4
) %>%
  rename(
    dea_code = `District Electoral Area 2014 Code`,
    dea_name = `District Electoral Area 2014 Label`,
    catholic = Catholic,
    protestant = `Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`,
    other = `Other religions`,
    no_religion = `No religion/religion not stated`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    total = catholic + protestant + other + no_religion,
    catholic_pct = catholic / total * 100,
    protestant_pct = protestant / total * 100,
    classification = case_when(
      catholic_pct > 50 ~ "Mayoría católica",
      catholic > protestant ~ "Pluralidad católica",
      protestant_pct > 50 ~ "Mayoría protestante",
      protestant > catholic ~ "Pluralidad protestante",
      TRUE ~ "Empate"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# 3. Cargar religión o religión de crianza 2021
religion_brought <- read_excel(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/Census2021_ religion brought up in.xlsx",
  sheet = "Table",
  skip = 4
) %>%
  rename(
    dea_code = `District Electoral Area 2014 Code`,
    dea_name = `District Electoral Area 2014 Label`,
    catholic = Catholic,
    protestant = `Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`,
    other = `Other religions`,
    no_religion = `None`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    total = catholic + protestant + other + no_religion,
    catholic_pct = catholic / total * 100,
    protestant_pct = protestant / total * 100,
    classification = case_when(
      catholic_pct > 50 ~ "Mayoría católica",
      catholic > protestant ~ "Pluralidad católica",
      protestant_pct > 50 ~ "Mayoría protestante",
      protestant > catholic ~ "Pluralidad protestante",
      TRUE ~ "Empate"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# 4. Unir mapas
map_actual <- dea_mapa %>%
  left_join(
    religion_actual,
    by = c("DEA2014_cd" = "dea_code")
  )

map_brought <- dea_mapa %>%
  left_join(
    religion_brought,
    by = c("DEA2014_cd" = "dea_code")
  )
```

```{r}
# 5. Comprobar unión
map_actual %>%
  summarise(
    total_dea = n(),
    con_datos = sum(!is.na(classification)),
    sin_datos = sum(is.na(classification))
  )

map_brought %>%
  summarise(
    total_dea = n(),
    con_datos = sum(!is.na(classification)),
    sin_datos = sum(is.na(classification))
  )
```

```{r}
# 6. Función para mapa DEA
hacer_mapa_dea <- function(data, mostrar_leyenda = TRUE) {

  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(
      data = data,
      aes(fill = classification),
      color = "grey30",
      linewidth = 0.15
    ) +
    geom_sf(
      data = st_union(data),
      fill = NA,
      color = "grey20",
      linewidth = 0.35
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "Mayoría católica" = "#A50F15",
        "Pluralidad católica" = "#FCBBA1",
        "Pluralidad protestante" = "#BDE0FE",
        "Mayoría protestante" = "#0077B6"
      ),
      breaks = c(
        "Mayoría católica",
        "Pluralidad católica",
        "Pluralidad protestante",
        "Mayoría protestante"
      ),
      name = NULL
    ) +
    coord_sf(datum = NA) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position = if(mostrar_leyenda) c(0.05, 0.95) else "none",
      legend.justification = c(0, 1),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.25, "cm"),
      plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
    )
}
```

```{r}
p_actual <- hacer_mapa_dea(
  map_actual,
  mostrar_leyenda = TRUE
)

p_brought <- hacer_mapa_dea(
  map_brought,
  mostrar_leyenda = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# 8. Mostrar los dos mapas juntos
grid.arrange(
  p_actual,
  p_brought,
  ncol = 2,
  top = "Religión actual vs religión de crianza"
)
```

```{r}
png(
  "religion_vs_brought_up_dea_2021.png",
  width = 3000,
  height = 1500,
  res = 300
)

grid.arrange(
  p_actual,
  p_brought,
  ncol = 2,
  top = "Religión actual vs religión de crianza"
)

dev.off()
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
